schema_version.description: Frozen wrapper version shared by all Topic 3 block types.
schema_version.title: Schema Version

block_id.description: Stable block identity generated by the owning agent.
block_id.title: Block Id

block_type.description: Rendering and validation family for the opaque block content.

ordinal.description: Zero-based order inside the candidate; ordinals must be contiguous.
ordinal.title: Ordinal

title.description: Optional student-visible title supplied by the owning agent.
title.title: Title

content_schema_version.description: Owning agent payload schema version for the content object.
content_schema_version.title: Content Schema Version

content.description: Frozen agent-specific content. Infrastructure must not rewrite it.
content.title: Content

content_sha256.description: SHA-256 of canonical content JSON, excluding wrapper metadata.
content_sha256.title: Content Sha256

dependency_block_ids.description: Candidate-local block dependencies used for ordering and validation.
dependency_block_ids.title: Dependency Block Ids

status.description: Generation status of this exact block version.

created_at.description: UTC block completion time from the owning agent.
created_at.title: Created At

agent_build_version.description: Owning agent build version used to generate the candidate.
agent_build_version.title: Agent Build Version

prompt_bundle_version.description: Frozen prompt bundle selected by the blueprint.
prompt_bundle_version.title: Prompt Bundle Version

provider_alias.description: Approved provider alias or local deterministic producer.
provider_alias.title: Provider Alias

provider_request_ids.description: Provider request identities retained for audit without credentials.
provider_request_ids.title: Provider Request Ids

candidate_id.description: Logical candidate identity preserved across revision versions.
candidate_id.title: Candidate Id

parent_candidate_version.description: Previous version when produced by a revision; null for version one.
parent_candidate_version.title: Parent Candidate Version

blueprint_id.description: Immutable Blueprint identity that authorized generation.
blueprint_id.title: Blueprint Id

blueprint_version.description: Exact Blueprint version bound to this candidate.
blueprint_version.title: Blueprint Version

blueprint_sha256.description: Canonical Blueprint hash used to detect drift.
blueprint_sha256.title: Blueprint Sha256

resource_type.description: Resource family owned by the generating agent.

status.description: Lifecycle status of this exact candidate version.

blocks.description: Ordered immutable blocks produced by the agent.
blocks.title: Blocks

provenance.description: Agent, prompt, provider, and request provenance.

personalization_policy_digest.description: Hash of the frozen Topic 2 personalization input used by generation.
personalization_policy_digest.title: Personalization Policy Digest

candidate_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the canonical candidate excluding this field.
candidate_sha256.title: Candidate Sha256

created_at.description: UTC completion time of this candidate version.
created_at.title: Created At
